span.p:
KvCacheConfig
freeGpuMemoryFraction · maxTokens
enableBlockReuse · hostCacheSize
onboardBlocks · crossKvCacheReuse

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVCacheManager
cpp/include/.../batch_manager/kvCacheManager.h
owns all WindowBlockManagers
routes requests by (numKvHeads, windowSize)

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WindowBlockManager A
numKvHeads=32 · windowSize=∞
standard full-context window

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WindowBlockManager B
numKvHeads=8 · windowSize=4096
sliding-window attention variant

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVBlockArray
kvCacheUtils.h · paged path
index table: batch × windows × 2 × max blocks per sequence
getKBlockPtr / getVBlockPtr per token

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVLinearBuffer
kvCacheUtils.h · contiguous path
flat tensor: batch × 2 × heads × sequence length × head dim
used when paging is disabled

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GPU Primary Pool
KVCacheBlockPool::primaryPtr
shape: max blocks × layers × 2 × heads × tokens per block × head dim

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CPU Secondary Pool
KVCacheBlockPool::secondaryPtr
pinned host memory for offloaded blocks
